---
title: "pennyone.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/core/commands/pennyone.ts"
loc: 39
complexity: 6
logic_score: 7.70
style_score: 3.69
intel_score: 3.03
overall_score: 4.27
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [Command](file://commander)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [join](file://node:path)
- [execa](file://execa)

### Exports
- `registerPennyOneCommand`
- `registerPennyOneCommand`
- `pennyoneBin`
- `searchScript`
- `analyticsScript`
- `scanPath`
